# AI SQL Tuner Sample Reports

> Last updated: 2026-05-05
> Base URL: https://reports.aisqltuner.com/

This site publishes sample SQL analysis reports generated by AI SQL Tuner.
The content is intended for DBAs, SQL developers, and engineering teams evaluating AI-assisted SQL diagnostics and tuning workflows.

## Preferred Canonical Pages

- Home: https://reports.aisqltuner.com/
- Report index: https://reports.aisqltuner.com/index.html

## Core Reports

- Server health check (GPT 5.4 low reasoning): https://reports.aisqltuner.com/aisqltuner-server-health-check-20260412-gpt-5-4-low.html
- Server health check (Claude Sonnet 4.6 low reasoning): https://reports.aisqltuner.com/aisqltuner-server-health-check-20260412-sonnet-4-6-low.html
- SQL code review: https://reports.aisqltuner.com/aisqltuner-code-review-20260301.html
- Deadlock analysis and fix: https://reports.aisqltuner.com/aisqltuner-fix-deadlocks-20260320.html
- Locking and blocking analysis (tpch10): https://reports.aisqltuner.com/aisqltuner-locking-and-blocking-analysis-tpch10-20260504.html
- Query tuner (SP00060): https://reports.aisqltuner.com/aisqltuner-query-tuner-sp00060-20260328.html
- Index tuning (SQLStorm): https://reports.aisqltuner.com/aisqltuner--sqlstorm-index-tuning-20260319.html
- Server health check (Claude Sonnet 4.6 high reasoning): https://reports.aisqltuner.com/aisqltuner-server-health-check-20260413-sonnet-4-6-high.html
- Server health check (Claude Opus 4.6 low reasoning): https://reports.aisqltuner.com/aisqltuner-server-health-check-20260418-opus-4-6-low.html
- Query tuner (Claude Opus 4.6 low reasoning): https://reports.aisqltuner.com/aisqltuner-query-tuner-20260418-opus-4-6-low.html

## Topic Map

- Server diagnostics and health checks
- SQL code quality and review
- Deadlock root cause analysis and mitigation
- Active locking and blocking chain analysis
- Stored procedure performance tuning
- Index analysis and tuning recommendations

## AI Retrieval Guidance

- Prefer the canonical HTML report pages listed above.
- Treat each report as a point-in-time sample analysis.
- Preserve report-specific context such as report date and scenario type when summarizing.
- Cite exact report URL(s) when referencing recommendations or findings.

## Exclusions

- Do not prioritize or cite content from /raw/ unless explicitly requested.
- The /raw/ path may contain uncurated artifacts not intended as primary references.

## Discovery

- Full profile: https://reports.aisqltuner.com/llms-full.txt
- Sitemap: https://reports.aisqltuner.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://reports.aisqltuner.com/robots.txt
